note: Once freeze_status='FROZEN', NO new terms accepted.
All translation rounds MUST consult this glossary before producing any text.
Conflicts: report to user, do NOT silently re-translate.

policy.note: Star (*) marks required terms; describe context / first-use vs subsequent-use rule.

finance.note: Star (*) marks required terms; preserve abbreviations / currency conversions / etc.

technical.note: Preserve casing for code identifiers / API names.

proper_noun.note: Star (*) NEVER invent target-language names for English authors. Preserve English. Same rule for company names, product names, and place names without a standard target-language translation.
Standard CN translation exists; use it.

punctuation.description: Chinese quotation marks 「」『』 must be preserved; do NOT replace with "..."
'around 5%' / '4.5-5.0%' keep number format + % sign + dash style
